title: keraselma seguieri
intro: Keraselma seguieri, also known as the Sea Rocket or Keraselma, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family, commonly found in coastal areas and sandy dunes. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Keraselma seguieri include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Keraselma seguieri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
